name: elohim-shards-web
description: Elohim Shards — multi-faction AI combat game
author: Kiliaan Vanvoorden <@BoozeLee>

scripts.build: if [ -f dist/index.wasm ]; then echo 'Godot web export found — using existing build'; else mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r src dist/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p dist/data && cp -r data/*.json dist/data 2>/dev/null; echo 'Static fallback build complete'; fi
